# bar

`Bar` declares a default `sm` control density for its contents (the chrome tier) — so toolbars and pane headers built on `Bar` are `sm` by construction; every leaf control, chip, and badge inside inherits it via `ControlSizeProvider`. Overridable via the `controlSize` prop; a nested region or slot can further override (innermost wins).

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Single-line chrome-strip primitive: the horizontal toolbar/header band (border-b + chrome height + inset, never-wrap via region-line) shared by app/pane toolbars and pane headers. Two tiers (chrome | pane); consumers compose it and own what they host.
- Web:
  - Uses: `primitives/css/line.Line`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.cn`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.ControlSize`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.ControlSizeProvider`
  - Exports: Types: `BarProps`, `BarTier`; Values: `Bar`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `apps/browser/bookmarks`, `apps/browser/shell`, `apps/browser/tabs`, `primitives/app-shell`, `primitives/pane`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
